title: user — declared entitlements
description: Five entitlement keys. Feature booleans gate capability visibility. Slots scope quantity. Pools scope per-period consumption (bulk-invite is quota-gated).

entitlements.description: Enables the User to hold TenantMember rows in more than one Tenant within the same Application. Off on the small tier — users have one home tenant only. When switched off after multi-tenant memberships exist, the entitlement reconciler picks the oldest membership per User and archives the rest.

Users can set `Profile.display_name` distinct from first_name + last_name. All tiers. Included here for symmetry — the entitlement is checked at the /me/profile update path when the caller submits display_name.
Global gate on avatar upload. All tiers, but per-tier size scaling is separately gated via `avatar_upload.max_kb` (see the settings blueprint for the resolved cap).
Enables `Profile.locale` per-user overrides. Off on small tier — users inherit the tenant's default_locale. Medium+ users pick their own.
Monthly CSV bulk-invite quota. Off (quota 0) on small tier. Enterprise = unlimited (null). One row in the CSV = 1 unit regardless of whether the invitation is accepted.
